creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
w3m staging is not correct.  When run in poudriere with testing on, this is the failure:

=======================<phase: deinstall      >============================
====>> Checking for orphaned files and directories in stage directory (missing from plist)
====>> Files or directories orphaned:
man/ja/man1/w3m.1.gz

===>  Cleaning for w3m-0.5.3_3

build time: 00:00:25
